_provenance.warning: Derived publication artifact only. Do not use as parser, validator, Lean, Rust runtime, or governance execution authority.

grammar.description: SiMON-FSL BNF grammar reference. Expressions are typed, role-scoped, and bundle-bound.

productions.expression: atom | compound | transition | mission_expr | stability_expr | constitutional_expr | query_expr | role_expr | tier_D_expr
productions.compound: expression binary_op expression | unary_op expression | expression '(' arg_list ')'
productions.mission_expr: M↑ '(' mission_id ',' scope ',' blast_radius ')' | M↓ '(' mission_id ',' actual_scope ',' blast_radius ')' | M⊥ '(' mission_id ',' pause_reason ')' | M→ '(' mission_id ')' | M✗ '(' mission_id ')'
productions.derivation_expr: '↦_FSL(' source ',' symbol ')' '@' proof_id | 'Δ_FSL(' proof_id ',' proof_id ')' | '⊕_sync(' mission_id ')'

semantic_rules: Tier B/C symbols require an active bundle declaration in scope
role_expr [r:X] e: actions(e) ⊆ permitted_actions(X) or TYPE_ERROR
Role bleed: ∃r1≠r2 ([r:r1] e ∧ [r:r2] e) at same level is TYPE_ERROR (R5)
M↑ valid only if A(mission_open) → ⊤; else unsatisfiable
Q[s](k) valid only if s ∈ K_surfaces; else TYPE_ERROR (R4)
L(M) ≤ β must match declared_blast_radius in active UpdatePacket
K ⊢ R requires lineage(R) traces to genesis or AMD_k ∈ K_AMD
Tier D symbols require bundle(simon.fsl.v1) active in scope or REJECTED
sort_connective: Connective(φ, ψ) is well-sorted iff sort(φ)=Prop and sort(ψ)=Prop
sort_quantifier: ∀ x:σ. φ is well-sorted iff sort(φ)=Prop; σ may be any sort
sort_relation: Relation(a, b) produces Prop regardless of sort(a) and sort(b)
sort_scott: Scott elements may not appear as direct Prop arguments to Connective or ¬
func_app: f(arg1, arg2, …) is a func_app node; infers sort Prop (predicate application is truth-valued); arg sorts are unconstrained (same as Relation)

Connective.description: Logical operator taking Prop arguments and returning Prop

Quantifier.description: Variable binder ranging over a typed domain

Prop.description: Truth-bearing proposition; may be asserted, negated, or composed via Connective. Dominant sort for rules, gates, axiom implications, theorems, GBO predicates, HTM predicates, and mission-state symbols.

Phase.description: Conversation or deliberation phase; mutually exclusive states

InputKind.description: UI input classification type; determines routing in the governance conversation pipeline

Entity.description: Named structural object; not truth-bearing; packets, proofs, registries, sets of constitutional components

Metric.description: Numeric scalar; appears in inequality expressions and stability bounds; cannot be asserted directly as a Prop

Relation.description: Binary predicate that produces Prop from arguments of any sort; does not itself have sort Prop but participates in Prop-sorted expressions

SetOp.description: Set operation producing a set from sets; result is Entity-sorted

Scott.description: Tier D fixed-point domain element; exists at the Gödel boundary; may not be passed directly to Connective as a Prop argument

glyph_promotion_policy.purpose: Non-enforcing gate for future promotion of glyph_candidate metadata into active symbols.

gate_values.promotable_now: Candidate has no active symbol binding and may be considered for promotion by a future UpdatePacket.
gate_values.display_only: Candidate may be used for documentation or publication display, but should not replace the active symbol.
gate_values.blocked: Candidate is attached to load-bearing, boundary, governance, or parser-shaped semantics and must not be promoted under this policy.
gate_values.requires_alias_plan: Candidate could be considered only with an explicit compatibility plan for legacy symbol aliases and theorem references.

non_goals: Do not promote any glyph in this mission.
Do not change active symbol values.
Do not rename theorem IDs or Lean declarations.
Do not make promotion gates parser, validator, runtime, or governance inputs.
Do not regenerate publication exports in this mission.
